info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud Contact Center AI proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud Contact Center AI API

post.description: Analyzes conversations in audio files in real time. Applications send HTTPS requests to retrieve responses.

tagDesc.example: 客服在服务客户过程中，基于已有的服务标准是否存在过度承诺的行为

desc.example: 用户来电咨询的原因分类，主要有投诉、咨询、政策建议等。

desc.description: The description of the enumeration value.
desc.example: 客户有新的需求/新的场景，客服跟进沟通需求细节

responseFormatType.description: The format of the output. Valid values: jsonObject (JSON structure) and text (raw string).

items.description: summary: conversation summary. title: title generation. fields: field information extraction. keywords: keyword extraction. service\_inspection: service quality inspection. question\_solution: problem and solution extraction. questions\_and\_answer: question and answer (QA) extraction. custom\_prompt: custom instruction.

serviceInspection.description: The structure for service quality inspection.

items.description: The structure of an inspection item.

content.description: The description of the inspection item.
content.example: 客服在服务客户过程中，基于已有的服务标准是否存在过度承诺的行为，如：最快到货时间是12小时，无法给客户承诺更快的到货时间。

inspectionIntroduction.description: A detailed introduction and description of the service quality inspection scenario.
inspectionIntroduction.example: 请检测客服是否存在服务不当的行为，包括：过度承诺、故意套取客户隐私信息等

stream.description: Specifies whether to return the result in a stream. Set to true for streaming output, or false for a complete response.

items.description: The template ID. If both a template ID and an instruction task type are specified, the template ID takes precedence.

asrModelCode.description: The speech-to-text model. Valid values: nls (small model) and paraformer (large model).

autoSplit.description: This parameter is typically used for single-channel recordings. Valid values are 0 and 1. A value of 1 indicates that automatic channel splitting is enabled. A value of 0 indicates that automatic channel splitting is disabled. Default value: 1. Setting this parameter to 1 treats the uploaded audio as a single-channel recording. Automatic channel splitting requires additional processing time. For dual-channel recordings, set this parameter to 0.

clientChannel.description: This parameter is used for dual-channel recordings. It specifies the channel number for the customer role. Valid values are 0 and 1. Default value: 1, which means channel 1 is the customer. Audio channels are typically numbered starting from 0, so two channels are 0 and 1. Confirm whether channel 0 is the agent or the customer. If using this parameter, also set the autoSplit parameter to 0. This parameter is ignored for single-channel files.

level.description: The priority of the speech-to-text task.

serviceChannel.description: This parameter is used for dual-channel recordings. It specifies the channel number for the agent role. Valid values are 0 and 1. Default value: 0, which means channel 0 is the agent. Audio channels are typically numbered starting from 0, so two channels are 0 and 1. Confirm whether channel 0 is the agent or the customer. If using this parameter, also set the autoSplit parameter to 0. This parameter is ignored for single-channel files.

serviceChannelKeywords.description: The list of keywords for the agent channel.

items.description: This parameter is typically used for single-channel recordings. Set a list of keywords that the agent is likely to say. Make sure to choose highly distinctive keywords. The system analyzes the transcript sentence by sentence. When a sentence contains a specified keyword, the speaker of that sentence is identified as the agent, and the other speaker is identified as the customer.

vocabularyId.description: The ID of the hotword vocabulary.

finishReason.description: This parameter applies to streamed output. It is null during content generation. When generation finishes, the value is stop if a stop token ends the process.

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

text.description: The result returned by the application.
text.example: 这段对话似乎是客服与客户之间关于一个服务或产品的讨论，但具体内容难以明确理解，因为对话中的言语比较零散和抽象。

post.description: Use the Tongyi Xiaomi CCAI Conversation Analysis AIO application to analyze image content, including watermark detection. Call this API using HTTP to obtain responses for your customers.

stream.description: Required. Set to true to return results in streaming mode. Set to false to return the full result at once.

finishReason.description: If streaming is enabled, this field is null while the response is generating. When generation ends, this field is stop if the response ends because of a stop token.

post.description: Retrieves conversation analysis results, such as conversation summaries, title generation, keywords, field information extraction, problems and solutions, service quality inspections, to-do items, satisfaction scores, emotion detection, QA extraction, user personas, and tag categorization. Applications can invoke this operation by making HTTP calls.

role.description:
The role in the conversation:

- user: The customer.

- agent: The customer service representative.

- system: A system message.

sessionId.description: The ID of the customer service session.

output.example: 问题描述：询问2.2更新时间，处理方案：已告知

sentences.description: A list of dialogue content examples.

items.description: An example of the dialogue content.

chatId.description: The ID of each conversation turn.

role.description:
The role in the conversation:

- user: The customer.

- agent: The customer service representative.

- system: A system message.

fields.description: A list of fields to extract during information extraction.

items.description: summary – Conversation summary. title – Title generation. fields – Field extraction. keywords – Keyword extraction. service\_inspection – Service quality inspection. question\_solution – Questions and solutions. actions – To-do items. satisfaction – Satisfaction level. emotion\_detection – Emotion detection. questions\_and\_answer – Q\&A extraction. user\_profile – User profile. category\_tag – Tag categorization.

title.description: The name of the service quality inspection dimension.

stream.description: Required. Specifies whether to use streaming output. Set to \`true\` to return the response in a stream. Set to \`false\` to return the complete response at once.

value.example: 表示客户的性别，从列表[“男”, “女”]中选择一个值

finishReason.description: If streaming output is enabled, this parameter is \`null\` while the response is being generated. If the generation stops because of a stop token, the value is \`stop\`.

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

post.summary: Invoke the Tongyi Xiaomi CCAI - Conversation Analysis AIO application by task type

post.description: Call the Tongyi Xiaomi CCAI Conversation Analysis AIO application to obtain conversation summaries, key information extraction, quality inspection results, and conversation analysis results. This API supports HTTP calls and returns responses to clients. You can choose between the standard HTTP or HTTP Server-Sent Events (SSE) protocols.

items.description: Structure of a single dialogue message

ChatId.description: Unique ID for a dialogue message

Role.description: Speaker role: user (customer), agent (agent), or system (system message)

SessionId.description: Unique ID for the entire dialogue session

Desc.example: 用户来电咨询的原因分类，主要有投诉、咨询、政策建议等。
客户有新的需求/新的场景，客服跟进沟通需求细节

Stream.description: Set to true to enable SSE streaming responses. Default is false.

post.summary: Invoke the Tongyi Xiaomi CCAI-Dialogue Analysis AIO application by template ID

post.description: You can call the Tongyi Xiaomi CCAI-Conversation Analysis AIO application using the Message protocol format to obtain conversation summaries, extract key information, and generate quality inspection and conversation analysis results. The application supports HTTP calls to provide responses. You can use either the standard HTTP or HTTP Server-Sent Events (SSE) protocol.

Messages.description: The list of messages for the model request.

Content.example:
如Role=system ,Content=You are a helpful assistant.
Role=user , Content=请阅读以下对话内容，按照要求执行指令任务。

Role.description: The role in the conversation. Valid values: \`user\` (customer), \`agent\` (customer service representative), \`system\` (system message), and \`function\` (function call).

Stream.description: Specifies whether to enable SSE responses. The default value is \`false\`.

FinishReason.description: For streaming output, the value is \`null\` during generation. If generation stops because of a stop token, the value is \`stop\`.

RequestId.description: The unique ID of the request.

Text.description: The result returned by the application.
Text.example: 这段对话似乎是客服与客户之间关于一个服务或产品的讨论，但具体内容难以明确理解，因为对话中的言语比较零散和抽象。

post.summary: Invoke the Tongyi Xiaomi CCAI-Dialogue Analysis AIO application using a native prompt

customPrompt.example: Analyze the content in the image

stream.description: Required. Set to true for streaming output or false for full output.

templateIds.description: Template ID. If both template ID and customPrompt are provided, the template ID takes precedence.

items.description: Template ID. If both template ID and instruction task type are provided, the template ID takes precedence.

finishReason.description: For streaming output, this field is null while generating. When generation ends due to a stop token, the value is stop.

text.example: 这张图片中没有可识别的文本内容。因此，无法进行OCR（光学字符识别）。如果你有其他需求或问题，请告诉我
